title: MOTHERS AGAINST DRUNK DRIVING - 211info
text: MOTHERS AGAINST DRUNK DRIVING MOTHERS AGAINST DRUNK DRIVING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline for those affected by drunk driving, drugged driving, and underage drinking. Victim advocates offer emotional support, advocacy in the criminal and civil justice systems, court accompaniment for victims/survivors, help to prepare victim impact statements, referrals to additional resources, connection to other victims/survivors, and educational materials. Support groups are available in many areas through local chapters. The agency focuses on increasing public awareness of and eventually eliminating drunk and drugged driving. Supports legislative measures that strive to reduce drunk driving crimes and provides Victim-Offender Panels. 511 E John Carpenter Freeway Suite 700 Irving, TX 75062 Eligibility: Individuals who have been affected by drunk or drugged driving or underage drinking Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (877) 623-3435 877 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (877) 623-3435 877-MADD-HELP Main phone (877) 275-6233 877-ASK-MADD INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Alcohol/Drug Impaired Driving Prevention Crime Victim Accompaniment Services * Accident Victims Specialized Information and Referral * Accident Victims If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOTHERS AGAINST DRUNK DRIVING
